name: @xifan-coder/mem
description: XiFan memory package - cross-session memory persistence and retrieval

scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: vitest run src/privacy/__tests__/privacy-filter.test.ts src/llm/__tests__/xml-parser.test.ts src/llm/__tests__/observation-generator.test.ts src/llm/__tests__/summary-generator.test.ts src/__tests__/mcp-server-runtime.test.ts src/__tests__/mcp-server.test.ts src/db/__tests__/database.test.ts src/db/__tests__/stores.test.ts src/queue/__tests__/queue-processor.test.ts src/manager/__tests__/memory-manager.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run src/privacy/__tests__/privacy-filter.test.ts src/llm/__tests__/xml-parser.test.ts src/llm/__tests__/observation-generator.test.ts src/llm/__tests__/summary-generator.test.ts src/__tests__/mcp-server-runtime.test.ts src/__tests__/mcp-server.test.ts src/db/__tests__/database.test.ts src/db/__tests__/stores.test.ts src/queue/__tests__/queue-processor.test.ts src/manager/__tests__/memory-manager.test.ts --coverage.enabled true --coverage.provider v8 --coverage.reporter text-summary --coverage.reporter json-summary --coverage.thresholds.lines 85 --coverage.thresholds.functions 85 --coverage.thresholds.statements 85
